plugins.name: arc42-documentation
plugins.description: Create, update, review, and audit arc42 architecture documentation — the 12-section template with Mermaid diagrams in Markdown.

plugins.name: music-domain-expert
plugins.description: Music-domain consultant for software projects — surfaces hidden assumptions in code, specs, and data models that touch theory, tuning, intonation, instruments, or notation.

plugins.name: arc42-documentation-architect
plugins.description: BMad agent (Gernot) — creates and maintains arc42 architecture documentation with Mermaid UML diagrams. Install via the BMad installer.

plugins.name: music-domain-expert-agent
plugins.description: BMad agent (Adam) — music theory, tuning, instrument idiomatics, and notation consultant. Install via the BMad installer.
